RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration Project

RISKS
R1 - Schedule slippage
R2 - Budget overrun
R3 - Scope creep
R4 - Resource availability
R5 - Quality issues
R6 - Stakeholder alignment
R7 - Communication breakdown

ISSUES
I1 - Delays in testing phase
I2 - Approval bottlenecks
I3 - Resource conflicts

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 - Resources will be available
A2 - Requirements are stable
A3 - Stakeholders are aligned

DEPENDENCIES
D1 - Vendor cooperation
D2 - Internal IT support
D3 - Stakeholder availability

Mitigations: Standard project management practices will be applied. Regular monitoring and escalation as needed.

Owner: Project Manager
